overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit downtown district. The player moves from a vegetated street corner along a multi-lane road with futuristic vehicle traffic, passing under an elevated highway structure with prominent holographic advertisements and the 'softsys' building visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: vegetated street corner with neon signage

events.description: moving from vegetated area onto concrete sidewalk
camera turns right to align with street direction

agents.ego_description: walking forward from behind vegetation toward the street, navigating around a twisted tree

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: gnarled tree with sparse leaves blocking part of the view
large pink glowing circular holographic advertisement on building facade
futuristic skyscraper with multiple illuminated billboards

segments.scene_description: The segment begins behind vegetation on a street corner, with a twisted tree and pink neon signage visible. The camera moves forward from the dirt onto a concrete sidewalk, turning to align with the multi-lane road where a futuristic vehicle passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk next to multi-lane arterial road

events.description: large concrete pillar temporarily blocks right side of view
ground becomes littered with trash and debris

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing a large concrete support pillar, navigating around scattered litter

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving past on the road

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete column with yellow base barrier
tall building with prominent green neon 'softsys' signage
scattered trash bags and debris on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk next to busy traffic, passing a large concrete pillar with a yellow base. The 'softsys' building becomes visible on the left while the ground shows significant litter. The camera moves steadily forward as vehicles pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown arterial with elevated highway overpass

events.description: view opens up to reveal elevated highway structure ahead
multiple vehicles pass by in both directions

agents.ego_description: continuing straight along the wide sidewalk toward the elevated highway, observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: white van driving away from camera down the road

entered.detail: raised multi-level highway structure with support columns spanning across the road
tree with distinctive red foliage on sidewalk median
yellow-topped concrete divider separating sidewalk from road
large floating advertisement screen displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban arterial with an elevated highway structure dominating the view ahead. The camera continues walking past a red-leaved tree and concrete barriers, with the 'softsys' building now visible in the distance. Multiple vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road as holographic advertisements glow above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a secluded, vegetated street corner into a wide, neon-lit urban arterial. It begins behind a twisted tree and pink signage, moving from a dirt patch onto a concrete sidewalk to align with a multi-lane road as a futuristic vehicle passes. As the camera advances along the litter-strewn walkway, it passes a large concrete pillar with a yellow base while the softsys building emerges on the left. The scene then opens into a broader vista dominated by an elevated highway structure, gliding past a red-leaved tree and concrete barriers. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal glowing holographic advertisements hovering above the busy traffic and the distant silhouette of the softsys building.
